caption:
What does a HydraFacial actually look like from start to finish? Let's walk through it.

Step 1: CLEANSE + PEEL
A gentle resurfacing solution loosens dirt, oil, and dead cells from the surface. You feel a slight tingling—that's the exfoliation working.

Step 2: EXTRACT + HYDRATE
The signature vortex suction tip glides across your skin. You can actually see the impurities being pulled out in real time (yes, it's oddly satisfying). Simultaneously, hydrating serums are being driven deep into your pores.

Step 3: FUSE + PROTECT
Antioxidants, peptides, and hyaluronic acid are infused to nourish, firm, and protect your freshly treated skin.

Total time: 30-45 minutes.
Discomfort level: Zero.
Downtime: None.
Immediate glow: Guaranteed.

This is why HydraFacial is our most-requested treatment month after month.

Book yours. Link in bio.
mediaDescription: Step-by-step Reel showing HydraFacial treatment in progress. Close-up of each phase: resurfacing tip on skin, extraction showing canister filling (the satisfying part), serum application. Shot from clinician POV. Clinical yet intimate. Soft background music overlay suggested.
